authority_boundary: Promotion decisions govern wiki record posture only. They do not validate source physics claims, prove formal equivalence, replace specialist review, or create execution authority.

MAP: linked mathematics crosswalk IDs when applicable

decision_records.result_reason: A durable source-evidence summary now exists, but no stable external locator, complete paper, or independent bibliographic confirmation is recorded. The records remain proposed and may not be promoted to mapped or accepted.
decision_records.required_next_event: Record a stable public source locator or source-confirmed bibliographic artifact, then perform specialist review against the preserved evidence and translation mappings.
decision_records.ownership: Admissibility Wiki proposal and decision governance
decision_records.non_claims: This decision does not reject or validate the paper and does not decide any physical theory claim.
